sqlQuery.name: AllCommunityDatasets
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', user_dataset_id) as dataset_id FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.AvailableUserDatasets WHERE is_public = true and is_owner = 1 AND (project_id = '@PROJECT_ID@' or ('UniDB' = '@PROJECT_ID@' && 'ClinEpiDB' != '@PROJECT_ID@'))

sqlQuery.name: All
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', user_dataset_id) as dataset_id, project_id as project, category, name, name as display_name, name as hyperlinkName, description, summary from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@AvailableUserDatasets where project_id = '@PROJECT_ID@' and is_public = true and is_owner = 1

sqlQuery.name: OwnerInfo
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT d.dataset_id, TRIM(COALESCE(first_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(middle_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(last_name, '')) as owner_name, organization as owner_organization from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d, (select * from public.crosstab( 'select user_id, key, value from @REMOTE_USERACCOUNTS_SCHEMA@.account_properties where key = in (''first_name'', ''organization'', ''middle_name'', ''last_name'') order by user_id, key', 'SELECT unnest(ARRAY[''first_name'', ''last_name'', ''middle_name'', ''organization''])') as userinfo ( user_id bigint, first_name varchar(4000), last_name varchar(4000), middle_name varchar(4000), organization varchar(4000)) ) userinfo where d.owner = userinfo.user_id

sqlQuery.name: DescriptiveMetadata
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, program_name, project_name, FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_meta

sqlQuery.name: publications
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dp.dataset_id) as dataset_id, pubmed_id, citation from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_publication dp

sqlQuery.name: contacts
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dc.dataset_id) as dataset_id, concat(dc.first_name, ' ', dc.middle_name, ' ', dc.last_name) as contact_name, affiliation from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_contact dc

sqlQuery.name: organisms
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', do.dataset_id) as dataset_id, species || ' ' || strain as organism_name from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_organism do, apidbtuning.organismAttributes oa where do.organism_abbrev = oa.internal_abbrev

sqlQuery.name: hyperlinks
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dh.dataset_id) as dataset_id, description from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_hyperlinks dh

sqlQuery.name: associatedFactors
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', daf.dataset_id) as dataset_id, factor from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_associated_factor daf

sqlQuery.name: fundingAwards
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dfa.dataset_id) as dataset_id, agency, award_number from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_funding_award dfa

sqlQuery.name: countries
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dc.dataset_id) as dataset_id, country from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_country dc

sqlQuery.name: species
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', ds.dataset_id) as dataset_id, species from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_species ds

sqlQuery.name: diseases
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dd.dataset_id) as dataset_id, disease from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_disease dd

sqlQuery.name: outcomes
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', do.dataset_id) as dataset_id, outcome from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_outcome do

sqlQuery.name: characteristics
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, study_design, study_type FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_characteristics

sqlQuery.name: sampleTypes
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, type as sample_type FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_sample_type ORDER BY type

sqlQuery.name: dois
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dd.dataset_id) as dataset_id, doi, description from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_doi dd

sqlQuery.name: bioprojectIds
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', dbi.dataset_id) as dataset_id, bioproject_id, description from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_bioproject_id dbi

sqlQuery.name: LinkedDatasets
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, linked_dataset_id FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_link ORDER BY linked_dataset_id
